penalties.description: Maximum time reached before completion. The loop was not successfully secured on the middle appendage and the tail was not cut inside the trainer.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: The video shows a clear ligating loop task setup with three foam appendages. The performer introduced the loop, positioned it around the middle appendage, and worked with the knot pusher. However, the final frames show the loop is not secured in the correct position on the middle appendage, and no tail cutting inside the trainer was observed. The task appears incomplete at the end of the video sequence, resulting in a zero score due to incomplete task status.
